description_long: This object is a compact, blocky machine gun with a predominantly dark metallic body and several brown components, likely representing wooden or polymer parts. The main body features a rectangular receiver with a protruding barrel and a box magazine extending downward from the center. The stock at the rear is simple and straight, with a brown finish, and the foregrip area also includes brown elements, possibly for improved handling. The trigger and trigger guard are visible beneath the receiver, and a small side lever or charging handle is present. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional, robust construction.
description: A compact, blocky machine gun with a dark metal body, brown stock, and a box magazine. Features include a simple stock, side lever, and brown foregrip components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel end, with the box magazine and side lever visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the rectangular receiver, brown foregrip, box magazine, and straight brown stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the alignment of the receiver and magazine.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 1 but with the side lever on the left and brown components visible.
attribute_stock_design: fixed straight stock with brown finish
